description_long: This is a large, multi-compartment wooden wardrobe or storage cabinet, featuring several tall vertical doors and open shelving units. The central section is composed of a series of horizontal shelves, ideal for storing folded clothes, shoes, or boxes. On either side of the central shelves, there are tall compartments with doors, likely intended for hanging garments or storing larger items. The rightmost section consists of open shelves, providing easy access to stored items. The cabinet stands on a wooden base that mimics a floor, giving it a stable and grounded appearance. The overall finish is a light, natural wood color, and the surfaces appear smooth and well-crafted.
description: A large, light wood wardrobe with multiple doors, open shelves, and a central section of horizontal shelving. The design is modern and functional, suitable for organized storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing all doors partially open, revealing hanging spaces, shelves, and open compartments.
description_view_1: Side view showing the depth of the cabinet and the alignment of the doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and door arrangement.
